_meta.description: WorkHive walkthrough finding registry. Every surface-level issue found during any walkthrough (manual or automated) lives here. L13 blocks push until every finding with severity >= medium has has_test=true OR has_validator=true.

schema.session: ISO date when finding was first observed
schema.domain: which of the 9 Sentinel Agent domains owns this
schema.has_test: true if a journey spec covers this class of bug
schema.test_file: the spec file that covers it (null if none)
schema.has_validator: true if a Sentinel Agent layer gates it
schema.validator_layer: e.g. L10, L11, L12 (null if none)
schema.fix_commit: git commit hash when fixed (null if not yet)

findings.issue: Card 3 'Open Issues' showed 0 despite 18 open work orders visible in stat-open. The renderer only read PM overdue — ignoring open WOs and low stock.
findings.root_cause: loadSupervisorSummary() only consumed v_pm_compliance_truth. v_logbook_truth and v_inventory_items_truth were declared in the source chip but never read by the renderer.
findings.test_file: tests/journey-hive.spec.ts — 'Open Issues card is NEVER 0 when stat-open shows work orders'

findings.issue: Plain-Read verdict block was below Stair card and Stats row — engineering data appeared before the 5-second read, burying the verdict.
findings.root_cause: Supervisor summary block was in HTML after #maturity-stairway-card. DOM order determined visual order.
findings.test_file: tests/journey-hive.spec.ts — 'supervisor sees the Plain-Read summary block'

findings.issue: Today's Brief panel showed 'No AI analysis yet. Reports generate automatically on schedule.' when no AI reports existed — wasting vertical space and looking broken.
findings.root_cause: loadTodaysBrief() always un-hid the panel, even with empty bullets. SessionStorage cache also poisoned the empty state.
findings.test_file: tests/journey-hive.spec.ts — 'Today's Brief panel stays hidden when no AI reports exist'

findings.issue: Network Benchmark showed 'General: 0.5d MTBF / Not enough data for network comparison yet' — showing the hive's own MTBF under a Benchmark header without any comparand.
findings.root_cause: loadBenchmarks() rendered all hive rows regardless of whether a network comparand existed. 'Not enough data' message appeared next to the hive's own value.

findings.issue: Pattern Alerts panel rendered confident pre-failure claims (Multi-Symptom BF-001, 4x Repeat MILL-001) with no source chip — supervisor could not audit what triggered the alert.
findings.root_cause: loadPatternAlerts() had no renderSourceChip() call. 3 of 4 detection rule formulas (escalating_frequency, multi_symptom, missed_pm) were also missing from canonical_formulas.

findings.issue: Verdict said 'Primary discipline 5 levels behind target' (red) while Card 1 said 'ON TARGET 5/5 / COMPLETE' (green) — direct contradiction on the same screen.
findings.root_cause: primaryGap used default target=5 for untracked primaries (PLC Programming not in DISCIPLINES). Card 1 used default target=2 and iterated only over the 5 standard DISCIPLINES. Same worker, two different computations.
findings.test_file: tests/journey-skillmatrix.spec.ts — 'REGRESSION: verdict and Card 1 do not contradict'

findings.issue: ReferenceError: _currentSection is not defined — page threw JS error on load, breaking the Plain-Read renderer.
findings.root_cause: renderMarketplaceSummary() referenced _currentSection but the state variable was named _section. Typo in variable name.

findings.issue: Identifier 'escHtml' has already been declared — page threw SyntaxError on load, crashing the entire script block. Source chip invisible, cards stuck on Loading.
findings.root_cause: utils.js was added to report-sender.html (to fix logPageView) but report-sender already defined escHtml inline. Duplicate declaration.
findings.validator_layer: validate_report_sender.py — esc_html check (now accepts utils.js as source)

findings.issue: Card 3 tag showed 'LOW' (red) for ON TRACK compliance percentage — misleading label that reads as 'low risk' not 'low compliance'.
findings.root_cause: The tag string 'LOW' was ambiguous. Needed to be 'BELOW STAIR' to match the Stair-readiness ladder (STAIR-READY / BUILDING / BELOW STAIR).
findings.test_file: tests/journey-pm.spec.ts — 'ON TRACK card tag is STAIR-READY, BUILDING, or BELOW STAIR'

findings.issue: 10 of 16 walkthrough pages had no top-of-page source chip — supervisor/worker could not trace what data was being shown or when it was last refreshed.
findings.root_cause: Source chips were only added to the first 6 pages (hive, alert-hub, analytics, predictive, asset-hub, ph-intelligence) during the original Plain-Read sprint. The remaining 10 were not addressed.
findings.test_file: tests/journey-pm.spec.ts + journey-inventory + journey-skillmatrix + journey-achievements + journey-project-manager + journey-marketplace + journey-report-sender + journey-shift-brain + journey-dayplanner

findings.issue: Analytics page always showed 'Analysis failed — check console' when uvicorn was not running. No graceful fallback state — just a banner and stuck Loading cards.
findings.root_cause: Python API (uvicorn) is a separate process that must be started manually. The page has no detection of this state to show a user-friendly 'API offline' message.

findings.issue: When page 8 (shift-brain) flaked and was retried, beforeAll ran again and wiped pages 1-7 screenshots. Only pages 8-16 were captured.
findings.root_cause: beforeAll cleared all PNGs before every test group. With retries:1 in playwright.config.ts, beforeAll re-runs before the retry group.

findings.issue: Submit button and textarea were unreachable by Playwright normal click — 'Element is outside of the viewport' / 'locator.click: Timeout 8000ms exceeded'. Sticky nav overlay covered interactive elements.
findings.root_cause: community.html has a sticky bottom nav that covers the post form's submit button at default viewport. Normal click fails; scrollIntoViewIfNeeded + el.click() bypass required.

findings.issue: Playwright test checking for audit log entries used class selectors ([class*='entry'], .wh-card) that matched 0 elements even when 41 entries were visible. Entries are plain divs with no class.
findings.root_cause: Audit log renders entries as unstyled div children of #feed — no class names. Selector assumed class-based structure.
findings.test_file: tests/journey-audit-log.spec.ts — 'audit feed renders entries or shows empty state'

findings.issue: 'Schema compliance' label exists in DOM as class='sl' (sub-label) inside a collapsed details pane. toBeVisible() failed even though the label exists.
findings.root_cause: Schema compliance is inside the details pane which starts hidden. Label exists but is not visible at initial page state.
findings.test_file: tests/journey-ai-quality.spec.ts — 'schema compliance card renders in content'

findings.issue: Verdict text is not displayed at the top of the page
findings.root_cause: False positive: page renders Plain-Read verdict correctly. AI misidentified scroll position or header as the verdict zone.
findings._proposed_gate: Verify verdict text presence and position

findings.issue: Verdict text is missing at the top of the page
findings.root_cause: False positive: page renders Plain-Read verdict correctly. AI misidentified scroll position or header as the verdict zone.
findings._proposed_gate: Verify verdict text presence and content

findings.issue: Verdict text is missing at the top of the page
findings.root_cause: False positive: page renders Plain-Read verdict correctly. AI misidentified scroll position or header as the verdict zone.
findings._proposed_gate: Verify verdict text presence on page load

findings.issue: Verdict text is missing at the top of the page
findings.root_cause: False positive: page renders Plain-Read verdict correctly. AI misidentified scroll position or header as the verdict zone.
findings._proposed_gate: Verify verdict text presence and content

findings.issue: Verdict text is missing at the top of the page
findings.root_cause: False positive: page renders Plain-Read verdict correctly. AI misidentified scroll position or header as the verdict zone.
findings._proposed_gate: Verify verdict text presence and content

findings.issue: Verdict text is missing at the top of the page
findings.root_cause: False positive: page renders Plain-Read verdict correctly. AI misidentified scroll position or header as the verdict zone.
findings._proposed_gate: Verify verdict text presence on page load

findings.issue: The page is displaying an 'Honest Empty State' instead of the expected intelligence verdict and data cards.
findings.root_cause: Expected behaviour: ph-intelligence shows honest empty state when network sample < threshold. By design.
findings._proposed_gate: A state-validator that ensures the 'Intelligence' view renders the verdict and cards when the user is at Stair 3 or above.

findings.issue: Verdict text is not found at the top of the page
findings.root_cause: False positive: page renders Plain-Read verdict correctly. AI misidentified scroll position or header as the verdict zone.
findings._proposed_gate: Verify verdict text presence on page load

findings.issue: No source chip is visible below the page title
findings.root_cause: False positive: chip IS visible in screenshot (small condensed text below subtitle). AI missed it.
findings._proposed_gate: Verify source chip presence below page title

findings.issue: Cards show real numbers (0) and are settled
findings.root_cause: Low-severity AI observation -- not actionable
findings._proposed_gate: Verify card numbers and settlement status

findings.issue: No contradiction between verdict tone and card values
findings.root_cause: Low-severity AI observation -- not actionable
findings._proposed_gate: Verify verdict tone consistency with card values

findings.issue: No empty states are visible when data exists (e.g., 0 reports, 0 contacts)
findings.root_cause: Low-severity AI observation -- not actionable
findings._proposed_gate: Verify empty state handling for existing data

findings.issue: The summary cards show zero values for entries, machines, and open items, which may indicate a loading failure or empty state rather than actual data.
findings.root_cause: Expected: empty state for a hive with no logbook entries. Not a bug.
findings._proposed_gate: A validator that checks if 'cards_settled' is true before allowing the page to be considered 'ready'.

findings.issue: The search input field contains a truncated placeholder 'Search machin' instead of 'Search machine'.
findings.root_cause: Low-severity AI observation -- not actionable
findings._proposed_gate: A UI regression test or linting rule for string length and overflow in input components.

findings.issue: The verdict text at the top of the page is not found
findings.root_cause: Expected: community is a write/log surface without Plain-Read verdict contract.
findings._proposed_gate: Verify that verdict text is present and displayed correctly

findings.issue: The cards do not show real numbers, but there are no cards visible in the screenshot
findings.root_cause: Low-severity AI observation -- not actionable
findings._proposed_gate: Verify that cards display real numbers or a loading state

findings.issue: There is no source chip below the page title or below each AI/derived panel
findings.root_cause: Detected automatically by walkthrough-analyzer. Investigate before gating.
findings.validator_layer: L11 insight panel anchor — chip added to page init
findings._proposed_gate: Verify that source chips are present and correctly attributed

findings.issue: There is no visible contradiction between the verdict tone and the cards
findings.root_cause: Low-severity AI observation -- not actionable
findings._proposed_gate: Verify that verdict tone matches the data displayed in the cards

findings.issue: There are no visible empty states or placeholders that should be hidden when data exists
findings.root_cause: Low-severity AI observation -- not actionable
findings._proposed_gate: Verify that empty states are handled correctly and placeholders are hidden when data exists

findings.issue: No .wh-source-chip was populated on community.html — supervisor cannot trace data provenance
findings.root_cause: Detected automatically by walkthrough-analyzer. Investigate before gating.
findings.validator_layer: L11 insight panel anchor — chip added to page init
findings._proposed_gate: Add renderSourceChip() call to the page's init function and register in L11 INSIGHT_PANEL_CONTRACT

findings.issue: Verdict text is not found at the top of the page
findings.root_cause: Expected: audit-log is a write/log surface without Plain-Read verdict contract.
findings._proposed_gate: Verify presence of verdict text at the top of the page

findings.issue: Cards are not settled and show no real numbers
findings.root_cause: Expected: audit-log is a read-only log view with no Plain-Read card contract.
findings._proposed_gate: Verify cards display real numbers or Loading

findings.issue: No source chip is present below the page title or AI/derived panels
findings.root_cause: Detected automatically by walkthrough-analyzer. Investigate before gating.
findings.validator_layer: L11 insight panel anchor — chip added to page init
findings._proposed_gate: Verify presence of source chip below page title or panels

findings.root_cause: Detected automatically by walkthrough-analyzer. Investigate before gating.

findings._proposed_gate: Add renderSourceChip() call to the page's init function and register in L11 INSIGHT_PANEL_CONTRACT
